\tzpentry{ID5635}{Minimal Output with Meta Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5635 introduces Minimal Output with Meta Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Omega_i \equiv n_i = \frac{2\pi}{T_i} \end{equation}
